goal: exists(k0: Real) { converges_to(a, k0) and sequence_cluster_set(a).contains(k0) }
proof: function(x0: Real) { not (converges_to(a, x0) and x0 ∈ sequence_cluster_set(a)) }(x)
function(x0: Real) { not x0 ∈ sequence_cluster_set(a) or not converges_to(a, x0) }(x)

function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Nat -> Real) { not is_closed_set(x0) or not seq_eventually_in_real_set(x0, x1) or sequence_cluster_set(x1) ⊂ x0 }(s, a)
